prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约15541→16342→17567→28583→19062名，整体呈波动后移趋势。2024年因专业组结构调整出现异常高位（28583），2025年回落 至19062名，近3年累计后移约1500名，2025年基准约19062名；该校在福建省物理类招生计划2021年52人、2022年55人、2023年57人、2024年53人、2025年55人 ，2026年增至59人，较2025年扩招4人（+7.3%），扩招对竞争有一定缓解作用，但幅度有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 云南大学是国家211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学主榜排 名约第71名（2026年），近年排名稳中有升（2021年第83→2026年第71），属于全国百强综合性大学；2025年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面，主要因就业数据引发 关注（生命科学学院就业率仅4.63%），对报考心理有一定负面影响；抖音热度排名第62位，评价为"一般"，短视频曝光量中等偏低，未见明显投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中，民族学获评A+、生态学获评A、统计学获评A-，三个A类学科支撑该校在人文社科与理学领域的特色优势，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续偏高，与该校物理类招生专业（计算机类、电子信息类、软件工程等）高度契合；福建省2026年高考总人数约2 6.79万，按近年比例估算物理类约20.4万人，较2025年（19.2万）增加约1.2万人，竞争加剧福建物理类本科批2021年423分→2025年441分，呈小幅上升趋势；云南大学位于昆明市，属西南地区，福建省考生跨省报考存在一定地域偏好差异，该校在福建招生占比不高，属省外招生院校，地域因素对报考热度影响中性。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 15541 → 16342 → 17567 → 28583 → 19062, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. In 2024, due to adjustments in major group structure, an abnormally high ranking (28583) occurred, which dropped back to 19062 in 2025. Over the past three years, the cumulative backward shift is about 1500 positions, with a baseline of approximately 19062 in 2025. The enrollment plan for Physics Category in Fujian Province was 52 in 2021, 55 in 2022, 57 in 2023, 53 in 2024, and 55 in 2025. In 2026, it will increase to 59, an expansion of 4 students (+7.3%) compared to 2025, which somewhat alleviates competition but to a limited extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Yunnan University is a national 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. It ranks approximately 71st on the Soft Science China University Main Ranking (2026), with a steady upward trend in recent years (from 83rd in 2021 to 71st in 2026), placing it among the top 100 comprehensive universities nationwide. During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation was slightly negative, mainly due to employment data concerns (the employment rate of the School of Life Sciences was only 4.63%), which has a certain negative impact on application psychology. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 62nd, rated as "average," with moderately low short video exposure and no significant record of enrollment gaps. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Ethnology was rated A+, Ecology was rated A, and Statistics was rated A-, with three A-level disciplines supporting the university's distinctive advantages in humanities, social sciences, and natural sciences, attracting some interest in related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity, which aligns well with the Physics Category enrollment majors at this university (Computer Science, Electronic Information, Software Engineering, etc.). In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam takers in Fujian Province is approximately 267,900, with an estimated 204,000 in the Physics Category based on recent proportions, an increase of about 12,000 compared to 2025 (192,000), intensifying competition. The undergraduate batch cutoff score for Physics Category in Fujian rose from 423 in 2021 to 441 in 2025, showing a slight upward trend. Yunnan University is located in Kunming, in the southwestern region. There are certain regional preference differences for Fujian candidates applying to universities outside the province. The university's enrollment proportion in Fujian is not high, making it an out-of-province enrollment institution, with a neutral impact on application enthusiasm due to regional factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in historical rankings, the slight enrollment expansion in 2026 (+4 students), the increase of about 12,000 Physics Category candidates in Fujian Province, and the negative reputation factors, competition in 2026 is expected to further intensify compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 20000, with a range of 19500–20500.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 19500–20500, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Statistics, Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering, etc.) as primary choices, with Tier 1 majors (Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering) as reach targets. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (below 19500), you can prioritize Tier 1 popular majors. If your ranking is near the upper bound of the range (around 20500), you should choose Tier 3 majors as safe options. Yunnan University's A-level disciplines in Ethnology, Ecology, and Statistics correspond to enrollment majors worth attention.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 2386 → 2323 → 2701 → 3445 → 3105, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. In 2021–2022, it stabilized around 2300, but from 2023 onward, it significantly shifted backward, reaching 3445 in 2024 and slightly recovering to 3105 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 800 positions over the past 3 years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 3105. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Fujian Province was 18 in 2021, 16 in 2022, 14 in 2023, 18 in 2024, and 15 in 2025. In 2026, it will increase to 16, an expansion of 1 student (+6.7%) compared to 2025, which is relatively small and has limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Yunnan University is a national 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, ranking approximately 71st in the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking (2026). It is a national top 100 comprehensive university with high influence in the Southwest region. During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation was slightly negative, mainly due to employment data attracting attention. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 62nd, rated as 'average', with moderate short video exposure. There is no history of admission gaps, and the application psychology is relatively stable. Ethnology is rated A+ (national top), Ecology A, and Statistics A-. Ethnology is highly correlated with the university's History Category enrollment majors (Ethnology, Sociology, History, etc.), providing positive attraction for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Law and Chinese Language and Literature are socially popular, matching the university's History Category enrollment majors (Law, Chinese Language and Literature, Journalism, etc.). In 2026, the total number of college entrance examination takers in Fujian Province is approximately 267,900, with an estimated 64,000 in History Category based on recent proportions, an increase of about 4,000 compared to 2025 (60,000), slightly intensifying competition. The Fujian History Category undergraduate batch score line dropped from 467 in 2021 to 450 in 2025, showing a slight decline in recent years. Yunnan University is located in Kunming, in the Southwest region, and there are regional preference differences for Fujian candidates applying across provinces. The university's enrollment scale in Fujian is small (only 15–18 for History Category), making it an out-of-province enrollment institution, with regional factors having a neutral impact on application popularity.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating and backward trend of historical rankings, the small expansion in 2026 (+1 student) but an increase of about 4,000 History Category candidates in Fujian Province, and the slightly negative university reputation, competition in 2026 is expected to be slightly more intense than in 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3300, with a range of 2800–3800.
